description:
All 4 flowchart samples show warnings:
- flowchart: edge_count (3 vs 8), labels_missing (A, B, C), node_count (3 vs 8)
- flowchart_complex: edge_count (0 vs 24), labels_missing (many), node_count mismatch
- flowchart_subgraph: edge_count (0 vs 9), labels_missing, node_count mismatch
- flowchart_all_shapes: labels_missing (many shapes missing), node_count (0 vs 24)

Visual similarity ranges from 1.9% to 26.6%. Nodes and edges are not being rendered correctly. Check src/diagrams/flowchart/ against reference-implementations/mermaid/packages/mermaid/src/diagrams/flowchart/
notes: 2026-05-02 leverage-on-quality follow-up loop: added FLOW-2.4 eval coverage and renderer normalization for Mermaid label markup/entities/escapes, plus FLOW-1.5 coverage for edges that target subgraph IDs. Eval progression: /tmp/selkie-pr-flow-eval structural 90%, 19 errors; /tmp/selkie-flow-loop-1 structural 91%, 15 errors after label markup normalization; /tmp/selkie-flow-loop-2 14 errors after removing duplicate subgraph endpoint nodes; /tmp/selkie-flow-loop-3 13 errors after Mermaid backslash escape normalization. Remaining flowchart blockers are layout/orientation/routing/styling families plus one edge-tokenization mismatch for unquoted dotted label ending in x ('PR #722 fi' vs 'fix').
title: flowchart: Missing nodes, edges, and labels across all samples
